name: allium sativum
title: allium sativum benefits
description: Allium sativum lowers cholesterol levels by reducing the amount of low-density lipoprotein (LDL) or "bad" cholesterol in the blood, while also increasing high-density lipoprotein (HDL) or "good" cholesterol levels. This benefit is important because high cholesterol levels can lead to the development of cardiovascular diseases, such as heart attacks and strokes, which are leading causes of death worldwide.
